form.formComment: Freshened since getting off the mark on debut; favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.3 len at Sandown-Hillside 2yo Hcp March 11 over 1000m defeating Money Honey with 59kg at $2.20. Straight to 1200m but can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Freshened since getting off the mark on debut; favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.3 len at Sandown-Hillside 2yo Hcp March 11 over 1000m defeating Money Honey with 59kg at $2.20. Straight to 1200m but can go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, favourite; won by 1.2 len at Muswellbrook 2yo Hcp March 8 over 1000m defeating Fawlty Affairs carrying 58kg at $5.50. Last start 2nd of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Under Focus carrying 57kg at $3.20. Drawn well and will take plenty of beating.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Raced two times to date. At debut, favourite; won by 1.2 len at Muswellbrook 2yo Hcp March 8 over 1000m defeating Fawlty Affairs carrying 58kg at $5.50. Last start 2nd of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Under Focus carrying 57kg at $3.20. Drawn well and will take plenty of beating.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in whilst under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 10 at Murray Bridge Mm 2yo Classic on March 7 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Rich On Bubbles with 57kg at $20. Second run from a spell 2nd in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo C&G Bm68 on March 21 over 1000m, 3 len behind The Speed Machine with 56kg at $11. Likely to find this out of reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 10 at Murray Bridge Mm 2yo Classic on March 7 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Rich On Bubbles with 57kg at $20. Second run from a spell 2nd in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo C&G Bm68 on March 21 over 1000m, 3 len behind The Speed Machine with 56kg at $11. Likely to find this out of reach.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding (Per Incanto - Isstoora). Peter G Moody & Katherine Coleman has him primed for this with four recent trials prior to his debut today. Won his most recent trial at Pakenham over 800m on March 24. Looks a capable type and can run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old gelding (Per Incanto - Isstoora). Peter G Moody & Katherine Coleman has him primed for this with four recent trials prior to his debut today. Won his most recent trial at Pakenham over 800m on March 24. Looks a capable type and can run well.

form.formComment: Gelding by Microphone on debut. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Happy to watch unless there is a significant move.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Microphone on debut. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Happy to watch unless there is a significant move.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Flemington in the G3 Tbred Breeders on March 28 over 1200m, in the wet; 3 len behind Satono Glow with 58kg at $2.10. The run before that favourite; won by 1.75 len at Flemington LR Festival February 28 over 1000m defeating La Gitana carrying 55kg at $3.50. Like her around a bend, sets the benchmark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Flemington in the G3 Tbred Breeders on March 28 over 1200m, in the wet; 3 len behind Satono Glow with 58kg at $2.10. The run before that favourite; won by 1.75 len at Flemington LR Festival February 28 over 1000m defeating La Gitana carrying 55kg at $3.50. Like her around a bend, sets the benchmark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, won by 1.3 len at Sale Mdn-Sw March 1 over 1112m in heavy going defeating Piperine carrying 56kg at $3. Last start raced on the pace before fading 10th of 12 at this track Vobis Showdown on March 14 over 1200m, 8 len behind Big Wigs with 56kg at $9.50. Can forgive last one, look for improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Lining up for just third start. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At very long odds at debut, from last on the turn second last of 8 at Flemington in the G3 Ottawa on March 7 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Medicinal carrying 56kg at $61. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw March 19 over 1100m in soft going defeating Wonderful Sky carrying 56kg at $12. Place looks best this time.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1100m, 7 len behind Medicinal carrying 56kg at $13. form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Was as a despised roughie at debut, 4th of 10 at Morphettville in the LR Deq Stks on March 28 over 1050m, 5 len behind Never Ordinary carrying 56kg at $61. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th of 12 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Chapados with 56kg at $9. Would have to improve sharply.
